headline: Kroger (KR) Stock Trades Up, Here Is Why
summary: Shares of grocery retail giant Kroger (NYSE:KR) jumped 3.8% in the afternoon session after analysts raised their price targets on the grocery giant, signaling confidence in its financial performance and strategic initiatives.

raw.headline: Kroger (KR) Stock Trades Up, Here Is Why
raw.summary: Shares of grocery retail giant Kroger (NYSE:KR) jumped 3.8% in the afternoon session after analysts raised their price targets on the grocery giant, signaling confidence in its financial performance and strategic initiatives.

headline: Kroger's Board of Directors Declares Quarterly Dividend
summary: The Kroger Co.'s (NYSE: KR) Board of Directors today declared a quarterly dividend of 35 cents per share to be paid on June 1, 2026, to shareholders of record as of the close of business on May 15, 2026.

raw.headline: Kroger's Board of Directors Declares Quarterly Dividend

headline: Friday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
summary: Stocks fell on Thursday as oil prices continued their surge. The Dow Industrials closed below 47,000 for the first time in 2026.

headline: S&P 500 is under pressure again from oil crisis, heads for third-straight losing week: Live updates
summary: The S&P 500 fell on Friday, while oil prices extended their gains as investors awaited further developments in the Iran war.

headline: 1 Value Stock for Long-Term Investors and 2 We Turn Down
summary: The low valuation multiples for value stocks provide a margin of safety that growth stocks rarely offer. However, the challenge lies in determining whether these cheap assets are genuinely undervalued or simply on sale due to their potentially deteriorating business models.

raw.headline: 1 Value Stock for Long-Term Investors and 2 We Turn Down
raw.summary: The low valuation multiples for value stocks provide a margin of safety that growth stocks rarely offer. However, the challenge lies in determining whether these cheap assets are genuinely undervalued or simply on sale due to their potentially deteriorating business models.

headline: Kroger plans to shutter 50 Little Clinics
summary: The move to close around a quarter of its Little Clinics comes shortly after the company confirmed that it would close all of its clinic sites in Georgia.

raw.headline: Kroger plans to shutter 50 Little Clinics

headline: PepsiCo: Improving, But Core Problems Remain
summary: PepsiCo remains a Strong Sell despite some operational improvements, as persistent long-term headwinds and limited margin for error outweigh these. Learn more about PEP stock here.
